dj_text: This is That Pirate Bot DJ Radio and we are NOT stopping! Regrettably. THE REAL SLIM SHADY | Medieval Bardcore Version | Eminem vs Beedle the Bardcore. And now, CELEBRATION | Medieval Bardcore Version | Beedle the Bardcore vs Kool & The Gang. Take a breath.
